title: Live Thesis Tracker
subtitle: Investment monitoring — five-year urban autonomy thesis
intro: Working record of the claim, the evidence watched, and the conditions that would change the view. Equity marks are secondary: they discipline timing and sizing, not the core argument.
leadPositions: Names implement the thesis in section I; they are not offered as a diversified portfolio. Read state and each line’s rationale before prices. Refreshed quotes are a check, not the thesis.
leadKpis: Observables outside listed prices. Entries are manual; the schema can accept feeds later without restructuring the page.
